name: trinity-workorder-to-notion (scaffolding)
_rationale: Rationale: n8n is the only external-action gateway. This workflow consumes Trinity WorkOrder JSON and executes Notion operations without hemispheres directly calling Notion.
_how: How: Placeholder workflow spec. Implementation will map `operation` and `payload` fields from the WorkOrder schema to the appropriate Notion node actions.
_contracts: Trinity posts WorkOrder to n8n webhook
Secrets are stored in n8n local credentials (n8n_data volume)
